headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Ignore
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 We Ignore
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: COIN Stock Up 29% in 3 Months But Valuation Expensive: How to Play
summary: COIN is up 29% in three months, but a 66x forward P/E looks stretched. This is the reason investors may want a wait-and-watch stance.

raw.headline: COIN Stock Up 29% in 3 Months But Valuation Expensive: How to Play

headline: Barclays Hikes Charles Schwab Price Target to $127: 2026 Guidance Crushes Street Expectations
summary: Barclays raised its price target on Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) to $127 from $117, keeping an Overweight rating after the brokerage giant’s fiscal 2026 revenue and expense guidance came in ahead of consensus. The price target raise reflects continued bullish positioning on a name where the bull thesis hinges on earnings power exceeding Street models. For ... Barclays Hikes Charles Schwab Price Target to $127: 2026 Guidance Crushes Street Expectations

headline: Robinhood Shares Gain on Higher April 2026 Equity & Options DATs
summary: HOOD rises 5.2% after April data shows higher equity and options trading, with platform assets surging 49% year over year to $345.4 billion.
